title: Self-contained shield build system
summary: Compared Secure-OpenClaw-Research-Assistant (14-file security overlay) against full openclaw upstream (8174 files, 925K LOC). Identified that the repo had no build step — just scattered config files. Added Dockerfile extending openclaw:local with baked-in config/agents/skills, self-contained docker-compose.yml with all security controls (seccomp, cap_drop ALL, read-only FS, resource limits, no-new-privileges), simplified setup.sh with auto-detection and --build-base flag, and updated kill-agent.sh + verify-security.sh to work from this repo. Removed docker-compose.hardened.yml overlay in favor of standalone compose. 28/29 security verification checks pass (1 expected fail: image not built yet).
